name: Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture. Then add oil, egg yolks, vanilla, and water. Beat with an electric mixer on low speed until combined. Then beat on high speed for 5 minutes or until satin smooth. Fold in orange and lemon peel. Set batter aside.
2. Thoroughly wash beaters. In a very large mixing bowl, beat egg whites and cream of tartar on medium to high speed until stiff peaks form (tips stand straight). Then pour batter in a thin stream over the beaten egg whites and gently fold in.
3. Pour batter into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan. Bake at 325°F for 65-70 minutes or until the top springs back when lightly touched. Immediately invert the cake onto a wire rack to cool completely. Using a narrow metal spatula, loosen the sides of the cake from the pan and then remove it from the pan. Cover and store at room temperature for up to 3 days. Makes 16 servings.
